sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-08-03 10:53
- Distance: 2.9 km
- Moving time: 20:10
- Elapsed time: 20:13
- Elevation gain: 154.8 m
- Average heart rate: 165.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 174 bpm
- Average watts: 211.4 W
- Average speed: 8.6 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `164.9 bpm`, ranging from `164.3` to `165.5 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `163.7 spm`, with a working range of `138.5` to `173.2 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `166.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `160.5 spm` (-6.3 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `7:00 /km` across `2.884 km` in `20:10` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:51 /km` and second-half pace was `7:09 /km` (+18 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `165.5 bpm` average and `174 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `166.0 bpm` in the first half and `164.6 bpm` in the second (-1.5 bpm), which reads as broadly stable across the run.

- Moving time was `20:10` out of `20:13` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `19` stop segments and `2.5%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `158.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `0.0 m` and `68.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `55.8 m` in the first half and `102.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
